channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Analyst says that Iran’s interest is in an extended war
item.description: Rob Geist-Pinfold, says that the United States has an interest in ending the war while Tehran is likely to prolong it.

item.title: Pakistan hosts top Saudi, Turkish, Egyptian diplomats over war in Iran
item.description: Talks are under way in Islamabad, as the Pakistani government acts as mediator between the US and Iran.

item.title: Iran’s IRGC claims attacks on UAE, Bahrain aluminium facilities
item.description: Iran targets Aluminium Bahrain, Emirates Global Aluminium in retaliation for US-Israeli attacks on its infrastructure.

item.title: ‘Trump has to open the Strait of Hormuz’ with ground forces
item.description: Kenneth Katzman says US war objectives in Iran that cannot be met with air power can be met with a ground invasion.

item.title: Thick plumes of smoke rise over Iraq’s Mosul after strikes
item.description: Thick plumes of smoke rise over Mosul after air strikes targeted sites belonging to Iraq’s Popular Mobilisation Forces.

item.title: Toddler rescued after US-Israeli strike on Iran
item.description: Rescue teams from the Iranian Red Crescent rescued a toddler from a destroyed building after a US-Israeli strike.

item.title: What happens in the occupied West Bank under the shadow of the Iran war
item.description: Since Israel went to war with Iran, settler violence in the occupied West Bank has surged.

item.title: As war on Iran enters second month, Yemen’s Houthis open new front
item.description: The Yemeni group pledges more attacks on Israel as fears mount that the worsening conflict will spiral out of control.

item.title: Iran war live: Pakistan, Turkiye, Egypt, Saudi seek to de-escalate
item.description: Push for diplomacy as Iran threatens retaliatory attacks on Israeli, US universities in the Middle East.

item.title: Key moments in first month of US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description: One month after US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, the conflict has escalated across the Middle East.
